creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu May 22 09:42:21 2014
New Revision: 354816
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354816
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354816/

Log:
  - Update to 0.15.14
  
  PR:		189110
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/py-mwlib/Makefile
  head/devel/py-mwlib/distinfo
  head/devel/py-mwlib/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/py-mwlib/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-mwlib/Makefile	Thu May 22 09:41:23 2014	(r354815)
+++ head/devel/py-mwlib/Makefile	Thu May 22 09:42:21 2014	(r354816)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	mwlib
-PORTVERSION=	0.15.11
+PORTVERSION=	0.15.14
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	wen@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Python's MediaWiki Parser and Utility Library
 
+LICENSE=	BSD3CLAUSE
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}parsing>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-parsing \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}gevent>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-gevent \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}odfpy>=0.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-odfpy \
@@ -29,10 +31,10 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pars
 
 USES=		zip
 USE_PYTHON=		2
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=yes
 PYEASYINSTALL_ARCHDEP=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} \
 		-e 's|lockfile==|lockfile>=|' \
